relationships: Process ISO42001-7 triggers related_processes ISO42001-6 and ISO42001-8
decision_points: IF AICompetenceCoverage < 0.9 THEN trigger competence development action
IF DataQualityScore < 0.85 THEN reject DataGovernanceFramework and request TrainingDataCatalog update
rules: All outputs must map to at least one compliance_flag from ['ISO 42001:2023 Clause 7', 'EU AI Act Art.10 data governance', 'GDPR training data', 'EU AI Act Art.4 literacy']
Automation_potential threshold 0.65 requires human review for sector_applicability in ['defense', 'pharma']
exceptions: If sector is 'defense' then bypass automation_potential and enforce 100% manual KPI validation
If related_process SCOR-DIG3 fails then pause outputs until resolved
data_requirements: AIInfrastructureInventory: JSON object with compute, storage, gpu fields sourced from inventory system
TrainingDataCatalog: array of dataset metadata with quality_score and gdpr_compliance boolean
CompetenceRequirements: list of role-skill pairs with required_coverage float
triggers: EU AI Act Art.10 compliance request received
success_criteria: All 4 KPIs exceed defined thresholds (AICompetenceCoverage >= 0.9, DataQualityScore >= 0.85, DocumentationCompleteness >= 0.95, TrainingCompletionRate >= 0.95) and all compliance_flags validated
failure_modes: Missing input TrainingDataCatalog causes DataGovernanceFramework generation to abort with error code DG-001
Low TrainingCompletionRate < 0.7 triggers full process rollback and competence gap report

agent_spec.decision_logic: Monitors KPI thresholds from decision_points on incoming events/triggers; applies rules to produce outputs mapped to compliance_flags or triggers updates/rollbacks on failure_modes
compliance_checks: EU AI Act Art.10 data governance

sop:
# SOP — AI Support — Resources, Competence and Data Governance
**Process ID:** ISO42001-7
**Framework:** ISO 42001:2023 | **Domain:** ISO 42001
**Generated:** 2026-06-10

## Purpose
Management of AI-specific resources including computational infrastructure, training data governance, AI competence development, awareness programs and AI system documentation

## Triggers
- Quarterly ISO 42001 Clause 7 audit start
- New AI system registration event
- EU AI Act Art.10 compliance request received

## Inputs Required
- AI infrastructure inventory
- training data catalog
- competence requirements
- documentation standards
- communication needs

## Process Steps
1. IF AICompetenceCoverage < 0.9 THEN trigger competence development action
2. IF DataQualityScore < 0.85 THEN reject DataGovernanceFramework and request TrainingDataCatalog update

## Expected Outputs
- AI resource plan
- data governance framework
- AI competence matrix
- AI system documentation
- awareness training records

## Business Rules
- All outputs must map to at least one compliance_flag from ['ISO 42001:2023 Clause 7', 'EU AI Act Art.10 data governance', 'GDPR training data', 'EU AI Act Art.4 literacy']
- Automation_potential threshold 0.65 requires human review for sector_applicability in ['defense', 'pharma']

## Exception Handling
- If sector is 'defense' then bypass automation_potential and enforce 100% manual KPI validation
- If related_process SCOR-DIG3 fails then pause outputs until resolved

## Success Criteria
- All 4 KPIs exceed defined thresholds (AICompetenceCoverage >= 0.9, DataQualityScore >= 0.85, DocumentationCompleteness >= 0.95, TrainingCompletionRate >= 0.95) and all compliance_flags validated

## Compliance Requirements
- ISO 42001:2023 Clause 7
- EU AI Act Art.10 data governance
- GDPR training data
- EU AI Act Art.4 literacy
test_cases: Test 1: happy path test: Provide complete AI infrastructure inventory, training data catalog, competence requirements, documentation standards and communication needs; verify agent produces full AI resource plan, data governance framework, AI competence matrix, AI system documentation and awareness training records with all required sections populated

Test 2: edge case: Supply training data catalog containing only synthetic or zero real records while other inputs are valid; verify agent still generates a data governance framework that explicitly flags data scarcity and adjusts competence matrix accordingly without crashing

Test 3: failure case: Omit competence requirements input entirely; verify agent detects missing mandatory input and returns incomplete AI competence matrix with clear error markers instead of producing a fabricated plan

Test 4: compliance check: Feed standard inputs and confirm every generated output references ISO 42001 clause 7 controls, includes traceability to input sources, and meets documentation standards for audit readiness

Test 5: escalation scenario: Detect conflicting competence requirements that cannot be reconciled with available infrastructure inventory; verify agent halts output generation and creates escalation record citing unresolved resource gap for human review
deployment_notes: Agent ready for deployment. Compliance: ISO 42001:2023 Clause 7, EU AI Act Art.10 data governance, GDPR training data, EU AI Act Art.4 literacy
